description: DeerFlow-inspired but deterministic research harness for poly1. It defines small skills, guardrails, and run modes for research/backtest/shadow work.

modes.standard: Single-threaded research or validation with structured output.
modes.pro: Multi-step research/backtest plan with explicit evidence.
modes.ultra: Reserved for future parallel subtask orchestration; never live trading.

skills.purpose: Evaluate 1/3/5/15 minute markouts, 30-day provider winrate, sample size, and PnL proxies before live promotion.
Review VWAP, z-score, volatility, and regime features for OpenBB/Alpaca/crypto tape signals.
Validate cross-venue prediction-market arbitrage using rule mapping, quote freshness, depth, and net profit after costs.
Convert papers, repos, and social strategy claims into structured claims, evidence level, replication plan, and risk notes.
Turn an approved research idea into a shadow-only spec with data requirements, expected EV hypothesis, metrics, and live blockers.
